---
title: ""
page-layout: custom
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
---

```{=html}
<div class="sk-home-wrapper">

  <!-- Profile Section -->
  <div class="sk-home-grid">
    <div class="sk-profile-left">
      <img src="assets/img/profile.jpg"
           alt="Seunguk Kang"
           class="sk-profile-img"
           onerror="this.src='https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=Seunguk+Kang&background=4F46E5&color=fff&size=160'">
    </div>

    <div class="sk-profile-right">
      <h1 class="sk-profile-name">Seunguk Kang</h1>
      <p class="sk-profile-role">
        Researcher · AI &amp; Computational Biology<br>
        <span style="font-size:0.85rem; color:var(--sk-text-muted);"><!-- Affiliation --></span>
      </p>
      <p style="font-size:0.95rem; color:var(--sk-text-secondary); max-width: 480px; line-height:1.7; margin-bottom:1.25rem;">
        <em style="color:var(--sk-text-muted);">Bio coming soon.</em>
      </p>
      <div class="sk-social-links">
        <a href="https://github.com/seungukkang" target="_blank">
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 0C5.374 0 0 5.373 0 12c0 5.302 3.438 9.8 8.207 11.387.599.111.793-.261.793-.577v-2.234c-3.338.726-4.033-1.416-4.033-1.416-.546-1.387-1.333-1.756-1.333-1.756-1.089-.745.083-.729.083-.729 1.205.084 1.839 1.237 1.839 1.237 1.07 1.834 2.807 1.304 3.492.997.107-.775.418-1.305.762-1.604-2.665-.305-5.467-1.334-5.467-5.931 0-1.311.469-2.381 1.236-3.221-.124-.303-.535-1.524.117-3.176 0 0 1.008-.322 3.301 1.23A11.509 11.509 0 0 1 12 5.803c1.02.005 2.047.138 3.006.404 2.291-1.552 3.297-1.23 3.297-1.23.653 1.653.242 2.874.118 3.176.77.84 1.235 1.911 1.235 3.221 0 4.609-2.807 5.624-5.479 5.921.43.372.823 1.102.823 2.222v3.293c0 .319.192.694.801.576C20.566 21.797 24 17.3 24 12c0-6.627-5.373-12-12-12z"/></svg>
          GitHub
        </a>
        <a href="mailto:your@email.com">
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,12 2,6"/></svg>
          Email
        </a>
        <a href="https://scholar.google.com" target="_blank">
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 24a7 7 0 1 1 0-14 7 7 0 0 1 0 14zm0-24L0 9.5l4.838 3.94A8 8 0 0 1 12 10a8 8 0 0 1 7.162 3.44L24 9.5z"/></svg>
          Scholar
        </a>
        <a href="cv/index.qmd">
          <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/><polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"/></svg>
          CV
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <hr class="sk-divider">

  <!-- Recent Publications -->
  <div class="sk-section-header">
    <h2>Recent Publications</h2>
    <a href="research/index.qmd">View all →</a>
  </div>

  <p style="color:var(--sk-text-muted); font-size:0.9rem; padding:1.5rem 0;">
    Publications coming soon.
  </p>

  <hr class="sk-divider">

  <!-- Recent Notes -->
  <div class="sk-section-header">
    <h2>Recent Notes</h2>
    <a href="notes/index.qmd">View all →</a>
  </div>

  <p style="color:var(--sk-text-muted); font-size:0.9rem; padding:1.5rem 0;">
    Notes coming soon.
  </p>

</div>
```
